svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Dashboard "Today's report" (DAILY) report card (wireframe)
svg.desc: Wireframe of the per-customer "AI analyses" dashboard section. Under the customer name "Acme Corp" the "Today's report" card shows the DAILY report tier badge "AI · HIGH"; the badge links to the Clumit Insight DAILY report page for the viewer's local calendar day. The card renders only when the DAILY summary resolves to a CRITICAL or HIGH tier.
svg.text: The DAILY date follows the viewer's timezone; the badge links to that day's Clumit Insight report.
